title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at SFC Group

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at SFC Group
jsonLd.description:
SFC Group invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Ahmedabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About SFC Group:
SFC Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with SFC Group!
